filename: The case for public sector healthcare organisations.docx
summary: This document outlines a strategic business plan for a health-tech startup targeting UK GP practices. It analyzes market segments including the NHS, private equity firms, and new private practices, evaluating business models and potential revenue streams. It highlights risks regarding technology adoption rates and validates the need for further market research.
path_to_original: /Users/eduardolizana/Documents/6. Companies /1. Companies with Rodrigo/KeepMeCompany/2. Company Plans/3. OS for Healthcare/The case for public sector healthcare organisations.docx
sniff_test_notes: Document title emphasizes public sector, but content heavily analyzes private equity opportunities. Contains specific revenue projections (£9M/year) and market size estimates.
